subject: Embed verification and execution rules in task-executor.md
description:
Distill essential rules from `execution-workflow.md` and `verification-patterns.md` and embed them directly in the `task-executor.md` agent definition. Remove instructions for agents to explicitly Read reference files at startup.

**What to implement:**

1. Read current `claude/sdd-tools/agents/task-executor.md` (~325 lines)
2. Read `claude/sdd-tools/references/execution-workflow.md` (~318 lines) to identify essential rules
3. Read `claude/sdd-tools/references/verification-patterns.md` (~256 lines) to identify essential rules
4. Distill and embed concise, action-oriented rules covering:
   - 4-phase execution workflow (Understand → Implement → Verify → Complete)
   - Verification classification (spec-based vs general tasks)
   - Result file format (status, task_id, duration, Summary, Files Modified, Context Contribution, Verification)
   - Context contribution format (structured 6-section schema from Task 1)
   - `produces_for` handling (reading upstream task output injected in prompt)
5. Remove explicit Read instructions for `execution-workflow.md`, `verification-patterns.md`, and `orchestration.md`
6. Keep `skills: [execute-tasks]` frontmatter for SKILL.md auto-loading
7. Target: ~425 lines (up from ~325, net +100 lines of embedded rules)

**Files to modify:**
- `claude/sdd-tools/agents/task-executor.md` (~325 lines)

**Reference files remain** in `references/` directory for documentation purposes but are NOT loaded by agents.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] task-executor.md contains embedded 4-phase execution workflow rules
- [ ] task-executor.md contains embedded verification classification rules
- [ ] task-executor.md contains result file format specification
- [ ] task-executor.md contains structured context contribution format (6 sections)
- [ ] Agent no longer instructed to Read execution-workflow.md, verification-patterns.md, or orchestration.md
- [ ] `skills: [execute-tasks]` frontmatter unchanged (SKILL.md still auto-loads)

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Embedded rules are concise and action-oriented (not verbose explanatory prose)
- [ ] No redundancy between embedded rules and SKILL.md content

_Performance:_
- [ ] Agent definition ~425 lines (not exceeding ~450)
- [ ] Net reduction of ~574 lines of startup file reads per agent

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify agent definition is coherent and complete
• Manual: Verify reference files are NOT referenced in agent Read instructions
• Integration: Validated during end-to-end execution session (Task 15)

Source: internal/specs/execute-tasks-hardening-SPEC.md Section 5.6
